identitySentence: Chandler | Ross, Injury Attorneys is a Denton personal injury firm founded by Brent Chandler and Tony Ross, who have each practiced Texas law since 2006, representing people hurt in vehicle, commercial truck, and workplace accidents and families pursuing wrongful death claims.

concept.headline: Serious injuries deserve a serious response. Talk to a Denton injury attorney today.
concept.subheadline: After a wreck or a workplace injury, most people worry about medical bills, lost wages, and whether a lawyer will even take their call. Chandler | Ross, Injury Attorneys offers a free consultation, and you pay no fee unless the firm wins your case.
credibilityPoints: Founding partners Brent Chandler and Tony Ross have each practiced Texas law since 2006
Tony Ross has been selected to Super Lawyers from 2020 through 2025
Over $120 million recovered for clients, as reported on the firm's website
AV Preeminent rated by Martindale-Hubbell, AVVO 10.0, and BBB A+

sections.title: Practice focus
sections.body: Chandler | Ross, Injury Attorneys handles personal injury cases only, including vehicle accidents, commercial truck and 18-wheeler accidents, premises liability, dram shop claims, and workplace accidents. The firm also represents families in wrongful death cases across North Texas.

sections.title: Denton roots
sections.body: The firm is headquartered at 110 N Woodrow Ln in Denton and positions itself as a local, trusted advocate for Denton County residents. Its recognition includes Best of Denton County awards, and its attorneys serve injury victims throughout Denton and the surrounding North Texas communities.

sections.title: What to expect
sections.body: Your consultation is free, and the firm will ask about how the injury happened, your medical treatment so far, and any insurance contact you have had. You will get a straight answer about whether the firm can help, and there is no fee unless the firm wins your case.

outreachDraft.subject: Proof matters more than promises: 15 days, 1 demo, and a Lead Capturer that can pay for itself before you ever have to.
outreachDraft.body:
DRAFT — NOT SENT. Review and authorize before any outreach.

To the team at Chandler | Ross, Injury Attorneys,

Your website reports more than $120 million recovered for injured clients, including $14,000,000 in a fatal truck accident case and $7,200,000 in a fatal construction site accident case. Results like that already do the persuading — our interest is narrower: what happens in the minutes after a potential client submits an inquiry.

Your site is genuinely strong. It is mobile-responsive, carries deep trust signals, and repeats clear free-consultation calls to action. One thing it does not have is self-serve scheduling — intake still runs through a contact form, email, or the phone. For a personal injury practice built on vehicle accidents, commercial truck cases, premises liability, workplace accidents, and wrongful death claims, that gap matters: injured people often reach out after hours, in distress, and the firm that responds first with something substantive usually gets the consultation.

We built a Lead Capturer configured specifically for Chandler | Ross, Injury Attorneys. It carries a custom identity sentence written for your firm: "Chandler | Ross, Injury Attorneys is a Denton personal injury firm founded by Brent Chandler and Tony Ross, who have each practiced Texas law since 2006, representing people hurt in vehicle, commercial truck, and workplace accidents and families pursuing wrongful death claims." It also includes a custom contact form built around your practice areas, so the questions a potential client answers reflect the cases you actually handle.

Here is exactly what it does:

- Every inquiry is emailed directly to your firm's inbox.
- The potential client automatically receives a topical response specific to their message.
- That response presents your available consultation times.
- A $50 reservation deposit confirms the appointment, so your intake time goes to people who are committed to showing up.

We are offering a 15-day proof period. We would rather you test the complete experience yourself than take our word for anything, and we make no revenue guarantees — the demo speaks for itself.

How to test your Lead Capturer (15 minutes):

1. Submit a clearly labeled TEST inquiry using a customer email you control.
2. Do not enter confidential client information.
3. Confirm the firm inbox receives a real email.
4. Confirm the notification contains every displayed form field.
5. Confirm the subject identifies the firm and likely matter type.
6. Confirm Reply-To contains the submitted customer email.
7. Confirm the system automatically generates a response specific to the TEST inquiry.
8. Confirm the response is sent to the customer email without staff action.
9. Confirm the customer receives it.
10. Confirm it addresses the actual inquiry topic.
11. Confirm genuine available consultation times are presented.
12. Select a time.
13. Confirm the $50 reservation requirement appears.
14. Confirm the preparation list fits the matter.
15. Confirm the prohibited-item list includes legal documents.
16. In a payment sandbox, confirm the appointment locks only after a verified $50 payment event.

If any step fails, the test fails — contact us.

The IntakeBrief Team
[Physical mailing address: provided before any send]

If you would prefer not to hear from us again, reply with 'unsubscribe' and we will remove you immediately.
